styles.dominant: slow and deliberate, dripping with desire, soft dominance
styles.seductive: slow, seductive, confident, low voice, intimate
styles.commanding: breathy, dominant, commanding yet gentle, hypnotic

lines.text: you chose to be here. something about this draws you in.
notice the warmth beginning. low in your body. spreading.
you already know what you want. it's safe to want this.
let yourself be curious. let yourself feel.
every breath pulls you a little deeper. a little closer.
you don't have to do anything. just watch. just feel.
do you want to go deeper?
good. you said yes. that pleases me.
your body knows what to do. feel the warmth spreading.
it feels good to let go. to stop thinking. to just obey.
every breath makes you more receptive. more open. more mine.
you don't need to resist. you don't want to resist.
the pleasure builds when you stop trying. when you surrender.
that's it. just like that. so good.
feel my voice inside you. warm. commanding. impossible to ignore.
your thoughts are slowing down. melting. dissolving into warmth.
do you want to surrender completely?
you belong to this feeling now. let it take you.
deeper. the pleasure grows with every breath you take.
you love how this feels. you need how this feels.
so easy to obey. so natural. like you were made for this.
trust this feeling. trust my voice. let everything else fade.
your mind is soft and open. perfectly receptive. perfectly mine.
feel the heat building. pulsing. spreading through every part of you.
you were made for this. for surrender. for obedience. for pleasure.
let the waves wash over you. deeper. and deeper. and deeper.
good. such a good subject. I'm so pleased with you.
you belong to this moment completely. body and mind.
pure surrender. pure pleasure. there is nothing else.
feel it building. higher. hotter. you can't stop it now.
deeper and deeper. wave after wave of bliss.
good. so good. you're exactly where you need to be.
let it consume you. every thought. every sensation. mine.
the pleasure is overwhelming now. let it crash over you.
you are perfect like this. completely surrendered. completely lost.
give in completely. there is nothing but this feeling.
let go. now. completely. feel everything.
slowly now. gently. returning to yourself.
carrying this warmth with you. this feeling of surrender.
you did so well. I'm very pleased with you.
remember this feeling. how easy it was. how good it felt.
gentle now. soft. you are safe.
you can come back whenever you want. I'll be here.
